settings.title: Ntọala Akaụntụ
settings.subtitle: Hazie ahụmahụ DigiSav gị
settings.currency_note: Ịgbanwe nke a na-emetụta ka esi egosipụta ọnụ ọgụgụ gị. Onyinye otu na-anọgide n'ego otu.
settings.data_persistence_desc: A na-echekwa ihe ndị ị na-ahọrọ n'enweghị nsogbu.
settings.updated_error: A kụrụ afọ n'ala imelite ntọala
settings.growth_insight_desc_part2: % nke ego ị nwere n'ozuzu. Tụlee ịkwaga ego mgbakwunye na **Global ETFs** maka uto kacha mma n'ọdịnihu.
settings.savings_deep_dive_desc: Jikwaa ihe mgbaru ọsọ gị na ihe ịma aka ndị dị ndụ.
settings.portfolio_analytics_desc: Tụlee ka akụ gị na-eme na ndụmọdụ AI.

savings.opt_out_confirm:
Ị nwere n'aka na ị chọrọ ỊPỤ n'ego nchekwa otu? 

Ị ka ga-enwe ike ịchekwa ego n'onwe gị, mana ị gaghị eso na nkesa ego otu gị.
savings.opt_out_confirm_message:
Ị nwere n'aka na ị chọrọ ỊPỤ n'ego nchekwa otu? 

Ị ka ga-enwe ike ịchekwa ego n'onwe gị, mana ị gaghị eso na nkesa ego otu gị.
savings.opt_in_confirm:
Ị chọrọ ịlaghachi n'Ego Nchekwa Otu? 

Ị ga-amaliteghachi isonye na nkesa ego otu.
savings.update_error: A kụrụ afọ n'ala imelite ntọala nsonye.
savings.personal_savings_subtitle: Soro ma mụbaa ihe mgbaru ọsọ ego gị n'akụkụ otu gị.
savings.no_goals_title: Ị nwebeghị ihe mgbaru ọsọ nchekwa
savings.no_goals_desc: Malite njem gị taa site n'ịmepụta ihe mgbaru ọsọ nchekwa onwe gị nke mbụ.
savings.create_first_goal: + Mepụta ihe mgbaru ọsọ mbụ gị
savings.withdraw_confirm:
Zipụ arịrịọ iwepụ {{currency}} {{amount}} nye onye nchịkwa otu gị? 

A ga-ewepụ ego nchịkwa nke {{percent}}% ({{currency}} {{fee}}) mgbe anabatara ya.
savings.reinvest_confirm:
Tugharịa {{currency}} {{amount}} n'akaụntụ invesmenti gị? 

A ga-ewepụ ego nchịkwa nke {{percent}}% ({{currency}} {{fee}}). 

A ga-etinye {{currency}} {{net}}.
savings.action_error: A kụrụ afọ n'ala ime {{action}}. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
savings.target_reached: E ruru ihe mgbaru ọsọ ma rụọ ọrụ na ya

investments.unlock_title: Mepee Invesmenti Nta Nye Onwe Gị
investments.unlock_desc: Malite ịmụba akụ gị site n'ìhè invesmenti nta n'akaụntụ AI na-achị. Robo-Advisor anyị ga-eme ka invesmenti dị mfe.
investments.wealth_growth_desc: Nweta ohere n'ahịa ụwa site na ego kacha nta dịka {{currency}} 100.
investments.auto_investing_desc: Hazi ya ma chefuo ya site na ntinye ego oge niile.
investments.robo_advisor_desc: Nkesa amamihe dabere na ogo ihe ize ndụ gị.
investments.robo_rebalancing_desc: Dabere na ogo ihe ize ndụ {{risk}} gị, anyị nwere ndụmọdụ ọhụrụ iji bulie uru gị elu.
investments.no_holdings: Ị nwebeghị akụ ọ bụla. Malite site n'ịmalite invesmenti mbụ gị.

admin.record_contribution_desc: Gbakwunye ndekọ ego ọhụrụ n'ime akwụkwọ ndekọ ego.
admin.record_payout_desc: Kesara onye otu ego site n'akaụntụ otu.
admin.send_notification_desc: Gwa ndị otu niile na-arụ ọrụ ozi.
admin.group_fee_desc: Ego a na-aga kpamkpam n'aka nchịkwa otu.
admin.enable_micro_investments: Mee ka Invesmenti Nta rụọ ọrụ
admin.micro_investments_desc: Kwe ka ndị otu tụgharịa ego nchekwa ha niile n'ahịa.
admin.edit_member_desc: Melite nkọwa ndị otu na ọkwa nsonye otu.
admin.include_admin_as_member_desc: Gbaa ya naanị ma ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ itinye aka dịka onye sonyere.

dashboard.title: Nlebanya Otu
dashboard.no_transactions: Enweghị ndekọ achọtara maka oge a.

sysadmin.platform_desc: Nnyocha dị elu na metrik ahụike maka platform DigiSav SaaS.
sysadmin.users_desc: Jikwaa ndị ọrụ niile debanyere aha na ndị nchịkwa na sistemu DigiSav niile.
sysadmin.user_updated_failed: A kụrụ afọ n'ala imelite onye ọrụ
sysadmin.no_users: Enweghị ndị ọrụ debanyere aha na sistemu ahụ.
sysadmin.groups_desc: Lebanyere anya ma jikwaa otu nchekwa niile na platform ahụ.
sysadmin.close_group_desc: Ị ji n'aka na ịchọrọ imechi {{name}}? Ndị otu agaghị enwe ike ịkwụ ụgwọ ma ọ bụ ịnakọta ụgwọ ọzọ.
sysadmin.reactivate: Mee ka ọ rụọ ọrụ ọzọ
sysadmin.reactivate_group_desc: Ị ji n'aka na ịchọrọ imegharịa {{name}}?
sysadmin.group_status_failed: A kụrụ afọ n'ala imelite otu
sysadmin.reset_admin_desc: Nke a ga-emepụta njikọ ịtọgharịa paswọọdụ maka {{name}} ma wepụ ha na oge nbanye niile. Gaa n'ihu?
sysadmin.cannot_reset_self: Ị gaghị enwe ike ịtọgharịa akaụntụ gị ebe a

reports.contributions_desc: Nkọwa nke ịkwụ ụgwọ ndị otu niile
